reasoning: The primary limiter for Koren is poor lactate clearance, as highlighted by the 9.3% drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. The last ride showed consistent output but lacked intensity work. This session will prepare Koren for the demands of the Sundance → Cascade Springs climb on the Alpine Loop by improving aerobic capacity and fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 4x10 minutes alternating between 2 minutes at 242-256W and 3 minutes at 201-218W with 2-minute easy spins in between.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
